positive: A symmetrical, central composition featuring stylized celestial elements merging with lush tropical foliage. Depict large, flowing bioluminescent mandalas formed by stylized ferns, tropical blossoms (hibiscus, monstera), and crescent moons. The artwork should be executed in a sophisticated, detailed linework style, resembling modern psychedelic etching or negative space illustration. Use a highly contrasting color palette: deep indigo, emerald green, teal, and metallic gold accents against a white background. The silhouette must be clean and graphic, suitable for a repeating apparel print. Vector art quality, high contrast, zentangle pattern incorporation, radial symmetry, intricate details, mystical, visionary, kawaii style.
negative: blurry, poor quality, low resolution, out of frame, amateur, extra limbs, bad anatomy, cropped, text, watermark, logo, signature, gradient shading, solid color background, realism, photorealism
